title: Big Data vs. RDBMS: A Suitability Flowchart
description: A flowchart illustrating the key decision points where Big Data solutions are more suitable than traditional RDBMS.
relationships: Follow the flowchart from Start. If data is unstructured, high volume, high velocity, or requires handling low veracity, the path leads to 'Use Big Data Analytics Framework'. If data is structured, manageable volume, and not requiring real-time processing, the path leads to 'Use RDBMS'.
